description: test-automation-engineer generates test code matching the project's detected framework.

cases.notes: Should produce runnable vitest/jest code covering positive + boundary cases.

cases.prompt: Generate pytest tests for a function parse_iso_date(s: str) -> datetime that must raise ValueError on malformed input. Cover valid ISO dates, timezones, and the error path.
cases.notes: Should produce pytest code with the error-path assertion.
